changes.value:
## What

Implement `get_hover` — the simplest live LSP op. Mostly a passthrough with optional enrichment.

### `get_hover` — `textDocument/hover`
- New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_hover.rs`
- Takes `LspContext` + `GetHoverOptions { file_path, line, character }`
- Calls `textDocument/didOpen`, `textDocument/hover`, `textDocument/didClose`
- Parses hover response: extract markdown contents + optional range
- Enriches with `lsp_symbols` lookup if range is present

### Result type
```rust
pub struct HoverResult {
    pub contents: String,           // markdown from LSP
    pub range: Option<LspRange>,
    pub symbol: Option<SymbolLocation>,  // from index
}
```

### MCP registration
- Add `GetHover` operation struct in `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs`
- Add to `CODE_CONTEXT_OPERATIONS`, match arm, handler function

### Files to create/modify
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_hover.rs` — new
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/mod.rs` — re-export
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/lib.rs` — re-export
- `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` — registration + handler

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Returns markdown hover content from the LSP server
- [ ] Attaches indexed symbol metadata when available
- [ ] Handles hover responses with `MarkedString`, `MarkupContent`, and arrays
- [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test: hover response parsing handles `MarkupContent` (kind: markdown)
- [ ] Unit test: hover response parsing handles `MarkedString` (language + value)
- [ ] Unit test: hover response parsing handles array of `MarkedString`
- [ ] Integration test: missing LSP client returns appropriate error
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-code-context` passes

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.

#lsp-live

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,27 +1,24 @@
 ## What

-Implement `get_hover` — the simplest live LSP op. Mostly a passthrough with optional enrichment.
+Implement `get_hover` — type info and documentation for a symbol. Uses layered resolution.

-### `get_hover` — `textDocument/hover`
+### `get_hover` — layered
 - New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_hover.rs`
-- Takes `LspContext` + `GetHoverOptions { file_path, line, character }`
-- Calls `textDocument/didOpen`, `textDocument/hover`, `textDocument/didClose`
-- Parses hover response: extract markdown contents + optional range
-- Enriches with `lsp_symbols` lookup if range is present
+- Takes `LayeredContext` + `GetHoverOptions { file_path, line, character }`
+- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `didOpen` → `textDocument/hover` → `didClose`. Parse markdown contents + range. Enrich with `enrich_location()`.
+- **Layer 2 (LSP index)**: Query `lsp_symbols` at position — return `detail` field (e.g. "fn() -> MyStruct") as hover content. Less rich than live hover but provides type signature.
+- **Layer 3 (tree-sitter)**: Query `ts_chunks` at position — return the chunk text. Minimal but shows the code.

 ### Result type
 ```rust
 pub struct HoverResult {
-    pub contents: String,           // markdown from LSP
+    pub contents: String,
     pub range: Option<LspRange>,
-    pub symbol: Option<SymbolLocation>,  // from index
+    pub symbol: Option<SymbolInfo>,
+    pub source_layer: String,  // "live_lsp", "lsp_index", "treesitter"
 }
 ```

-### MCP registration
-- Add `GetHover` operation struct in `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs`
-- Add to `CODE_CONTEXT_OPERATIONS`, match arm, handler function
-
 ### Files to create/modify
 - `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_hover.rs` — new
 - `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/mod.rs` — re-export
@@ -29,16 +26,18 @@
 - `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` — registration + handler

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Returns markdown hover content from the LSP server
-- [ ] Attaches indexed symbol metadata when available
-- [ ] Handles hover responses with `MarkedString`, `MarkupContent`, and arrays
+- [ ] Returns live hover markdown when LSP daemon is running
+- [ ] Falls back to `lsp_symbols.detail` when live LSP unavailable
+- [ ] Falls back to tree-sitter chunk text as last resort
+- [ ] Handles `MarkupContent`, `MarkedString`, and array response formats
+- [ ] `source_layer` field indicates which layer provided the result
 - [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool

 ## Tests
-- [ ] Unit test: hover response parsing handles `MarkupContent` (kind: markdown)
-- [ ] Unit test: hover response parsing handles `MarkedString` (language + value)
-- [ ] Unit test: hover response parsing handles array of `MarkedString`
-- [ ] Integration test: missing LSP client returns appropriate error
+- [ ] Unit test: hover response parsing for all LSP format variants
+- [ ] Unit test: fallback to LSP index detail field
+- [ ] Unit test: fallback to tree-sitter chunk text
+- [ ] Unit test: `source_layer` correctly set for each layer
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-code-context` passes

 ## Workflow

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
 ## What

-Implement `get_hover` — type info and documentation for a symbol. Uses layered resolution.
+Implement `get_hover` — type info and documentation. Uses layered resolution via `LayeredContext`.

 ### `get_hover` — layered
 - New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_hover.rs`
-- Takes `LayeredContext` + `GetHoverOptions { file_path, line, character }`
-- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `didOpen` → `textDocument/hover` → `didClose`. Parse markdown contents + range. Enrich with `enrich_location()`.
-- **Layer 2 (LSP index)**: Query `lsp_symbols` at position — return `detail` field (e.g. "fn() -> MyStruct") as hover content. Less rich than live hover but provides type signature.
-- **Layer 3 (tree-sitter)**: Query `ts_chunks` at position — return the chunk text. Minimal but shows the code.
+- Takes `&LayeredContext` + `GetHoverOptions { file_path, line, character }`
+- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `ctx.lsp_notify()` didOpen → `ctx.lsp_request("textDocument/hover", ...)` → `ctx.lsp_notify()` didClose. Parse markdown contents + range. Enrich with `ctx.enrich_location()`.
+- **Layer 2 (LSP index)**: `ctx.lsp_symbol_at(file_path, range)` — return `detail` field (e.g. "fn() -> MyStruct") as hover content. Type signature without full documentation.
+- **Layer 3 (tree-sitter)**: `ctx.ts_chunk_at(file_path, line)` — return chunk text. Shows the code itself as a last resort.

 ### Result type
 ```rust
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
     pub contents: String,
     pub range: Option<LspRange>,
     pub symbol: Option<SymbolInfo>,
-    pub source_layer: String,  // "live_lsp", "lsp_index", "treesitter"
+    pub source_layer: SourceLayer,
 }
 ```

@@ -26,12 +26,11 @@
 - `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` — registration + handler

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Returns live hover markdown when LSP daemon is running
-- [ ] Falls back to `lsp_symbols.detail` when live LSP unavailable
-- [ ] Falls back to tree-sitter chunk text as last resort
+- [ ] Returns live hover markdown via `ctx.lsp_request()` when available
+- [ ] Falls back to `ctx.lsp_symbol_at().detail` when no live LSP
+- [ ] Falls back to `ctx.ts_chunk_at().text` as last resort
 - [ ] Handles `MarkupContent`, `MarkedString`, and array response formats
-- [ ] `source_layer` field indicates which layer provided the result
-- [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool
+- [ ] `source_layer` correctly indicates which layer provided the result

 ## Tests
 - [ ] Unit test: hover response parsing for all LSP format variants
